meta.title: Eissa Almannaei — AI Researcher & Expert
meta.description: Eissa Almannaei is an AI researcher and expert on a mission to empower every Emirati to build the future with AI and agentic AI.

hero.title: Empowering every Emirati to build the future with AI.
hero.subtitle: I research, teach, and build agentic AI — turning frontier technology into practical capability for people, institutions, and the nation.

vision.statement: I believe every person can unleash their ambition for the future using AI. My mission is to empower every Emirati to understand, trust, and build with AI and agentic AI — turning today's frontier into tomorrow's everyday capability.

projects.title: Agents I've built
projects.intro: Real, working AI agents — most built for an Arabic-first context.

items.name: Contract Status Checker
items.desc: An AI agent that audits 1,000+ contracts for attachment completeness, reads scanned documents with OCR, and flags every gap automatically.

items.name: RASSED AI Monitor
items.desc: An autonomous agent that tracks global AI news around the clock and publishes a daily, design-ready Arabic PDF briefing.

items.name: AI Research Monitor
items.desc: A deep-research agent that compiles frontier AI developments into a bilingual, RTL dashboard with streamed insights and exportable PDF reports.

about.title: Eissa Almannaei
about.lead: I help people and institutions in the UAE and the Arab world understand and apply AI in a way that is practical, trustworthy, and genuinely empowering.
body: I'm an AI researcher and expert focused on agentic AI — the systems that don't just answer, but act. My work spans research, public speaking, and building real AI agents, with a particular focus on the Arabic-first context.
I've delivered 50+ workshops and programs with government entities, universities, and companies across the UAE, translating complex technology into capability people can use the same day.
My mission is simple: empower every Emirati to build the future with AI. I believe everyone can unleash their ambition using these tools — and I'm here to make that real.
about.speakingDesc: I speak on sovereign AI, agentic AI, trustworthy AI, and building with AI — for institutions, universities, and the public.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.lead: Whether it's a talk, a training program, consulting, or a question — reach out and I'll get back to you.
contact.formNote: This opens your email app with the message ready to send.

footer.tagline: Empowering every Emirati to build the future with AI.
